caption: A woman with light-brown hair styled in a high bun wears black headphones and a black t-shirt while speaking into a professional microphone in a studio setting. She is positioned against a black wall bordered by a yellow vertical stripe. Behind her, a screen displays the name "Johnson" in red lettering. On-screen logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appear in the lower corners of the frame, accompanied by the smaller text "By 11 Logo Studio." Across the sequence, the woman speaks and gestures with her hands to emphasize her points; her left hand moves from a raised position near her shoulder down toward her side, and her right hand moves from out of view into the frame, gesturing outward. The camera remains stationary, focusing on her upper body and the recording equipment as she continues her conversation.
